facts: NIT Jamshedpur is located in Adityapur, District Saraikela Kharsawan, Jamshedpur, Jharkhand 831014.
Dean Academic office: dean.ac@nitjsr.ac.in, Tel: +91 657-2372001.
Hostel I is for 2nd year students with single occupancy.
Hostel L is for 1st year, PG, and PhD students — double sharing for 1st years, single for PhD/PG.
Hostel E is for 2nd year students with single occupancy.
Hostel F is for 2nd year students with single occupancy.
Hostel G is for 2nd year students with single occupancy.
Hostel H is for 2nd year students with single occupancy.
Hostel A is a girls hostel.
Hostel B is a girls hostel.
Hostel C is a girls hostel.
Hostel D is a girls hostel.
Rani Laxmi Bai is a girls hostel.
Ambedkar Hall of Residence is a girls hostel.

mess.mess_advance: Rs 18,000 per semester (tentative, adjusted at actual)
daily_items: Breakfast: Bread (6 pcs), jam & butter, milk or tea, banana or egg (1 pc).
schedule: Monday breakfast: Besan Chila + Green Chutney. Lunch: Jeera Rice, Arhar Dal, Seasonal Veg, Curd. Snacks: Poha + Lal Chana + Tea. Dinner: Masoor Dal, Veg Korma / Chicken Butter Masala (4 pcs).
Tuesday breakfast: Plain Paratha + Aloo Chana. Lunch: Sambhar, Kadhi Pakoda, Papad. Snacks: Chowmein + Coffee. Dinner: Chana Dal Tadka, Gulab Jamun.
Wednesday breakfast: Puri + Aloo Tamatar. Lunch: Dal Fry, Aloo Palak Bhujia, Boondi Raita. Snacks: Chatpata Chana + Fried Chilli + Tea. Dinner: Chana Dal, Matar Mushroom / Chicken Hyderabadi (4 pcs).
Thursday breakfast: Idli + Vada (4 pcs) + Sambhar + Chutney. Lunch: Dal, Rajma, Dahi, Pickle. Snacks: Litti Chokha (2 pcs) + Coffee. Dinner: Veg Pulao, Aloo Gobi Matar, Suji Halwa.
Friday breakfast: Sattu/Methi Paratha + Aloo Matar. Lunch: Dal Tarka, Green Moong Masala, Veg Raita. Snacks: Samosa + Aloo Matar + Tea. Dinner: Peas Pulao, Paneer Keema / Egg Curry (2 pcs).
Saturday breakfast: Aloo Paratha + Green Chutney. Lunch: Dal Makhani, Papad.
mess.cuisine: North Indian, with Jharkhand specialties (Litti Chokha, Sattu Paratha)

totals: General/OBC 1st semester: Rs 62,500 (tuition) + Rs 12,500 (institute) + Rs 15,000 (hostel) + Rs 17,000 (one-time) + Rs 18,000 (mess) = Rs 1,25,000.
General/OBC subsequent semesters: Rs 62,500 + Rs 12,500 + Rs 15,000 + Rs 18,000 = Rs 1,08,000.
SC/ST/PH 1st semester: Rs 0 (tuition) + Rs 12,500 + Rs 15,000 + Rs 17,000 + Rs 18,000 = Rs 62,500.
SC/ST/PH subsequent semesters: Rs 0 + Rs 12,500 + Rs 15,000 + Rs 18,000 = Rs 45,500.
fee_waivers: Family income below Rs 1 lakh per annum: full tuition fee waiver.
Family income Rs 1-5 lakh per annum: 2/3rd tuition fee waiver.
fee_structure.source: Official Notice S-26/2025, Ref. NITJSR/ACD/2025/108, dated 08/05/2025

facts: WiFi is available at NIT Jamshedpur.
LAN is available at NIT Jamshedpur.
75% attendance is mandatory at NIT Jamshedpur.
Sports activities fee of Rs 1,500 per semester is included in institute fees.
On-campus canteens: Amba, Annapurna, Nescafe, Continental.
Night canteens are available.
Washing machines are not available in the hostels.
Washing facilities are available within the campus for students.
NIT Dispensary is on campus with ambulances available at any time for emergencies.
Nearby hospitals: Meditrina Hospital, SaveLife Hospital, ESIC Hospital.
Medical and insurance fee of Rs 1,000 per semester is included in institute fees.
Nearest airport: Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi.
Nearest railway station: Tatanagar Railway Station.
Nearest bus stand: Mango Bus Stand.
Bus transport fee of Rs 1,000 per semester is included in institute fees.
Nearby restaurants: Just Chill, Hungry Kya, The Lion Restaurant, Blue Diamond.
Swiggy, Zomato and all food delivery apps are available.
NIT Store is nearby.
Sudha Milk Parlour is nearby.
Basti Shops are nearby.
Serious misconduct: Rs 20,000 to Rs 30,000.
Hostel expulsion: Rs 30,000.
Ragging: approximately Rs 20,000.
Minor offences: Rs 2,000.
Late registration: Rs 1,000.
Delayed fee and registration: Rs 2,000.
NIT Gymkhana is free for students.
Paid options nearby: Fitness Factory, Tiger Hill Gym, Golds Gym.
NIT Jamshedpur has a tropical climate with extreme seasonal shifts.
Scorching summers, heavy monsoon rains, and mild pleasant winters.
Hindi, English, Bengali, and Santhali are spoken at NIT Jamshedpur.
Spring Semester 2025-26 timetable (Version 2.0, effective 08-01-2026).
Branches covered: Civil Engineering, CSE, ECE, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.
Class timings: 8:30 AM to 5:55 PM.
Lunch break: 12:30 PM to 2:00 PM.
Lab classes have 3 groups: G1 (Roll 1-40), G2 (Roll 41-80), G3 (Roll 81-Last).
Workshop has 2 groups: G1 (Roll 1-60), G2 (Roll 61-Last).
